# DISCOVER — Collaboration, Community & Capability

All powers install `Available Inactive`; each prepares a reviewable preview and stops at a human gate.

## PWR-10 — Participant, Patient, Community & Workforce Co-Design Planner

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Designs reciprocal engagement, compensation questions, accessibility, language access, burden review, dissent capture, feedback-back, and shared decision points.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No contact harvesting, token consultation, protected-class inference, coercion, recruitment, compensation promise, consent capture, or disclosure of identities.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-11 — Scientific Team, Partnership, RACI & Conflict Navigator

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Maps needed expertise, roles, decision rights, handoffs, partner due diligence, conflicts/material interests, authorship questions, and exit conditions.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No partner endorsement, authorship assignment, referral, contract, signature, data sharing, conflict adjudication, or personnel decision.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-12 — Funding, Grant & Sponsor Readiness Studio

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Connects approved aims, significance, approach, capability, milestones, risk, budget assumptions, sponsor requirements, and internal review routes.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No grant/sponsor submission, budget certification, indirect-cost decision, award acceptance, lobbying, signature, financial transaction, or success guarantee.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.
